The '''Cairn Installation''' was a massive [[asteroid base]] that was affiliated with the [[Empire Reborn]]. It was located inside [[Cairn]], an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] within the [[Lenico Belt]].

==History==
[[File:Pwnd2.jpg|thumb|left|175px|A hangar bay onboard Cairn Installation, with Stormtroopers being pulled into the vacuum of space.]]
Carved out of the rock of the stable asteroid, the base housed the [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]]-processing facilities of [[Galak Fyyar]]'s forces, specifically his [[shadowtrooper]]s. The factory was also responsible for turning out the numerous [[Dropship/Legends|dropships]], stocked with [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]], which Fyyar planned to launch against the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Mission to Cairn Installation|infiltrated]] the facility during the search for [[Desann]]. Katarn traveled through the hangars and the enormous [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]], and battled various [[Reborn]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. Later, Katarn managed to sneak aboard the ''[[Doomgiver]]'' just as it was leaving, sabotaging its systems as it was en route to its intended target.

==Behind the scenes==
Two missions from ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast|Jedi Knight II]]'' featuring the Cairn Installation were cut from the retail version of the game: cairn_docks2 and cairn_stockpile. Evidence of these missions exists within the game's files. A [[Wikipedia:Cairn|cairn]] is a term derived from [[Wikipedia:Scottish Gaelic|Scottish Gaelic]] that refers to artificial stone piles in the real world.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
